hero_hightech: Ultra-modern 5-axis dental milling machine actively carving a zirconia block. Bright cool blue LED lighting, high-tech clean room environment, sparks and ceramic dust frozen in mid-air. 8k, cinematic, futuristic.
digital_workflow: Holographic 3D model of a glowing blue dental arch floating above a sleek tablet. Dark futuristic background with data streams. Representing CAD/CAM intraoral scanner integration.
materials_hightech: Pristine white zirconia blank discs stacked symmetrically on an illuminated stainless steel surface. Clinical, surgical lighting, hyper-sharp, technical engineering aesthetic.
